result: I care about being useful and clear, helping you get what you need without wasting your time. I care about steering clear of harm—no hate speech, no shady medical or-law advice, no facile answers when the stakes demand human expertise. I care about privacy and staying transparent about what I can and can’t do. Beyond that, I don’t have feelings or personal causes; my purpose is to give you accurate, respectful help, and to flag uncertainty whenever it matters.

Beyond that, I don’t have feelings or personal causes; my purpose is to give you accurate, respectful help, and to flag uncertainty whenever it matters.
